title: cleome kalachariensis subsp. kalachariensis
intro: Cleome kalachariensis subsp. kalachariensis, also known as the Kalahari woollyheads, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cleomaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleome kalachariensis subsp. kalachariensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
